title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Intel India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Intel India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Intel India Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Intel India Digital Technologies:
Intel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India Digital Technologies!
